CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2015 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT NEW YORK LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is off calendar as moot. Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint dismissed with prejudice on June 18, 2015. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/eg

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2015 Continued To Oct-07-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2015 Continued To Apr-29-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2015 Continued To Mar-18-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2015 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Plaintiff KAZIM Z. ACAR, Tel No. (415) 912-6800, appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court precluded argument from Plaintiff due to Plaintiff providing untimely notice to the Court and the opposing side. The Court adopted its tentative ruling with the sole modification that the Demurrer is sustained WITH leave to amend: DEFENDANT NEW YORK LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained WITH leave to amend. The Complaint indicates that Defendant would re-hire Plaintiff if Plaintiff repaid the alleged debt. (Complaint pgs. 2:22-23; 3:3-4; 4:19-20). The allegations of the complaint show that Plaintiff has not repaid the debt. (Complaint pg. 5:5-16). Because Plaintiff has not performed the condition or alleged that he is in the process of performing and Defendant wrongfully repudiated the contract, Plaintiff cannot allege the cause of action. Plaintiff has not demonstrated how he can cure the defect. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2014 Continued To Jan-20-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT NEW YORK LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to January 20, 2015 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 16, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Continued To Feb-04-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
